Two palette calls

Real crown PNG, real coin mixes, real family inks. Every ratio computed with the app's own instrument (black/white anchor = 21.00). 4.5 is the readable floor for small marks; 3.0 is the floor for large ones.

1 · The crown on the gold coin

Left of each pair is light paper, right is Espresso Night. The coin border is the same gold, so it never rescues the mark.

Current
1.61 / 1.17
your gold, as it ships
A · darker gold
4.58 / 4.60
solver-walked until it clears 4.5 (#77611a / #5e4d14) — this is the olive you were worried about
B · gold + rim
edge / edge
your gold untouched; a dark edge does the separating
C · inverted
11.48 / 8.36
espresso crown on the gold coin

2 · Day numbers on parchment

The sheet said this was "one value in the theme block". It is not — the plain grey number is the best case; the mode-coloured numbers are the floor.
